summary: Classified the open Qwen/DashScope image-tool cluster in read-only plan mode. #92688 remains the canonical issue. #92770 is the strongest non-security fix candidate but merge is blocked by the job policy, so it is kept related for maintainer follow-up. #92704 is superseded by the narrower #92770 path. #92782 is explicitly listed as a security-signal ref by the job and is routed to central security handling without blocking unrelated non-security classification.

actions.reason: Best surviving issue for the root cause.
Open PR #92704 overlaps #92688 but is less safe than #92770 and is blocked by proof and CI failures.
Strongest non-security candidate fix, but merge is out of scope for this plan-mode job.
Exact ref is marked by the job as a security-signal item requiring central security handling.
